The '''NiteSite infrared motion sensor''' was a type of [[Sensor/Legends|sensor]] manufactured by [[Neuro-Saav Corporation]]. A popular visual enhancement system, the NiteSite was favored by the [[Ubese/Legends|Ubese]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Boushh/Legends|Boushh]].

==Description==
[[File:NiteSite2.jpg|thumb|left|160px|A schematic of an Ubese raider helmet with a NiteSite infrared motion sensor attached.]]
The NiteSite [[Infrared motion sensor|infrared and motion sensor unit]] was manufactured by [[Neuro-Saav Corporation]] and was designed to be fitted into a battle [[Helmet/Legends|helmet]]. The data collected by the [[Sensor/Legends|sensor]] was displayed on a readout screen displayed inside the helmet. The NiteSite's infrared scanners were capable of detecting heat sources up to a range of two hundred [[Meter/Legends|meters]]. The [[Analytical computer/Legends|analysis computer]] attached to the unit could track and highlight up to fifty individual targets on the internal screen and was capable of fifty times zoom magnification.<ref name="EGWT" />

A cluster of [[low-illumination enhancer]]s that could detect any physical objects within a range of ten meters of the user was fitted to the NiteSite, which allowed the wearer to see clearly and move unhindered while in complete darkness. A [[flash guard visor]] protected the wearer from flashes of lights that could blind the wearer and overwhelm the enhancers. In the event of a burst of light from explosions, torches, [[Flare/Legends|flares]], or [[flash grenade]]s, the visor activated within one-thirtieth of a [[Standard second|second]] to negate the effects.<ref name="EGWT" />

[[File:NiteSite3.jpg|thumb|right|250px|NiteSite infrared motion sensor Scope view.]]
The NiteSite could be synchronized with the wearer's [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]], either through a wireless link or a hardwired connection cable. This enabled the weapon's fire vector to be displayed on the helmet's internal read-out screen. Additional sensors could also be connected to the NiteSite unit through input ports. Weighing half a [[Kilogram/Legends|kilogram]], the unit was constructed of sturdy composite [[Plastic/Legends|plastics]] that protected its miniaturized optics. At a cost of six hundred [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]], the Nitesite became a popular device due to its reliability and ease of use.<ref name="EGWT" />

==History==
The [[Ubese/Legends|Ubese]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Boushh/Legends|Boushh]] incorporated a NiteSite [[infrared motion sensor]] in the battle [[Helmet/Legends|helmet]] he wore as part of his [[Ubese raider armor|armor]].<ref name="EGWT" />
